Package at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom

This package contains all the atomic types like Function, TermVar, HedgeVar.

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Function
    A TermAtom which represents a function symbol.
    HedgeVar
    A hedge variable can be substituted by a single TermNode or a hedge which is represented by a TermNode with a null-atom TermNode.isNullAtom().
    TermAtom
    Base class for all the atomic types like function symbols and variables.
    TermVar
    A simple term variable can be substituted by a single TermNode.
    Variable
    This is the base class for different types of variables.

Package at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom Description

This package contains all the atomic types like Function, TermVar, HedgeVar.
